mapper.select: select account_id, user_id, card_no, holder_name, holder_type, balance, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from campus_card_account where user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select tx.transaction_id, tx.account_id, tx.transaction_no, tx.transaction_type, tx.amount, tx.balance_after, tx.scene_name, tx.status, tx.transaction_time, tx.create_by, tx.create_time, tx.update_by, tx.update_time, tx.remark from campus_card_transaction tx inner join campus_card_account account on account.account_id = tx.account_id where account.user_id = #{userId} order by tx.transaction_time desc, tx.transaction_id desc
mapper.update: update campus_card_account set balance = #{balance}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where account_id = #{accountId} and status = '0'
